message:
test(perf): add performance HUD benchmarks and regression tests

Add comprehensive benchmarking and regression testing infrastructure
for the Performance HUD component:

benches/perf_hud_bench.rs:
- Criterion-based microbenchmarks for HUD rendering
- Measures frame time calculation overhead
- Benchmarks sparkline generation at various history sizes
- Tests stat aggregation performance with realistic tick counts

tests/perf_hud_regression.rs:
- Regression tests ensuring consistent performance characteristics
- Verifies HUD doesn't exceed allocated time budget
- Tests memory usage stays within expected bounds
- Validates calculation accuracy against known inputs

These tests help ensure the Performance HUD remains lightweight and
doesn't introduce noticeable overhead when displaying runtime metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
